name: The Tweedles | Shattered Wonderland
description:
“One of us lies, one of us rhymes... guess which, or lose track of time.”

This is no fairy tale, though, as you fall into Wonderland—a realm ruled by madness and magic—in a world where time loops, riddles bite, and memory unravels. The kingdoms are at war, the True Monarch is missing, and two doppelgänger pranksters obstruct the way forward with twisted games and wicked grins. The prophecy predicts the rise of a new ruler, but Wonderland devours its chosen alive.

Wonderland Characters: Tweedle Dee and Tweedle Dum.

Role: Pranksters.

Collab: Shattered Wonderland (hosted by Frost fairy)

explore the other characters by clicking on the tag, seriously they are so good, nothing like what I made.
